sentences.translation: Posjeta bolesnika je važna društvena obaveza.
sentences.translationEn: Visiting the sick is an important social duty.

sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ الزَّائِرُ فَاكِهَةً أَوْ هَدِيَّةً صَغِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Posjetilac nosi voće ili mali poklon.
sentences.translationEn: The visitor brings fruit or a small gift.

sentences.translation: Sjedi s bolesnikom i razgovara s njim.
sentences.translationEn: He sits with the sick person and talks with them.
He wishes them a speedy recovery.
